description: KTLO work for General Listings Marketplace keeps the domain reliable, secure, supportable, and operable.
methodology: KTLO is modeled like an objective set, but the key results represent operational categories that must be continuously managed.

companyObjectives.title: Maintain reliability, security, and operational continuity
companyObjectives.statement: Keep the General Listings Marketplace domain safe to run by controlling incident load, reducing operational drag, and addressing mandatory maintenance work before it compounds.

objectives.title: General Listings Marketplace KTLO baseline
objectives.objective: Protect service continuity and delivery capacity in General Listings Marketplace by managing critical bugs, paying down technical debt, and applying security maintenance work on time.

keyResults.target: Reduce the open Sev1 and Sev2 bug backlog and restore service quickly when failures occur.
keyResults.baseline: Measured from the current operational backlog.
keyResults.statement: Reduce critical bug exposure in General Listings Marketplace.

keyResults.target: Retire high-friction legacy components, brittle workflows, and manual operational work that slows delivery.
keyResults.baseline: Measured from the current engineering debt register.
keyResults.statement: Reduce structural tech debt in General Listings Marketplace.

keyResults.target: Keep critical and high-severity vulnerabilities within patch SLAs across production systems and dependencies.
keyResults.baseline: Measured from the current vulnerability backlog and patch compliance posture.
keyResults.statement: Keep security patching current in General Listings Marketplace.
